name: Keyboard key
goal: Render a single keyboard key cap with consistent monospace styling and a subtle inset shadow.
description: Inline primitive for keyboard shortcuts. The slotted text is shown inside a small bordered cap with monospace font and a 1px lower-edge shadow that suggests a physical key. The component carries no attributes by design — multi-key chords compose with regular HTML (drop multiple <ce-kbd> next to each other separated by a plus or hyphen). role=text is set by default so screen readers treat the cap as a single token rather than splitting on punctuation.

slots.description: Key label — a glyph (⌘, ⇧, ↵), a letter (K), or a multi-character name (Esc, Enter, Shift).
